title: Onboard Research — Specialist Findings
description: Structured output contract for one research specialist (built-in or user-supplied). The verifier and synthesizer consume this shape. A specialist that cannot evaluate its dimension returns status 'not-assessed' with an empty claims array.

dimension.description: The dimension this specialist assessed, e.g. 'architecture'.

status.description: 'not-assessed' when the specialist could not evaluate the dimension; claims must then be empty.

evidence.description: path or path:line anchors supporting the claim.
